body.title: context-load: truncate decisions_log to hot window (top 5) to save ~2500 tokens/load
body.result: Fixed context-load skill Step 2: switched from head-30 to tail-10 so we actually read RECENT decisions (recent decisions are appended at the bottom, not prepended at the top). Updated D305 in decisions_log.dsb and MEMORY.md to reflect correct file orientation. The old head-30 was reading D001-D020 (foundational/stable) every load instead of the hot decision window.
body.description: context-load Step 2 reads top 30 decisions_log lines (~3175 tokens) even though only 5 are hot. At 30-40 context-loads/session × 2 sessions/month = ~$30/month wasted on cold decisions. Fix: read only top 5 lines in context-load SKILL.md Step 2 by default; add --full flag for deep dives. Process finding from deep-audit Panel 9.
